title: Moderation update: spam & harassment actions
body: We processed recent high-severity abuse reports. Two accounts were banned for clear violations: spam_wave_42 for high-volume phishing spam across multiple channels, and toxic_runner for sustained targeted harassment of community members. A separate high-severity report against a core_maintainer was reviewed and determined to be a false-positive driven by disagreement with a prior moderation decision; no action was taken on that account. As always, we prioritize safety while protecting trusted contributors from bad-faith reports.
